ns0:entry.ns0:title: FB208/OpenBidKit_Yibiao
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FB208/OpenBidKit_Yibiao
Language: javascript
开箱即用的AI标书编写工具，标书AI生成工具，投标工具箱、知识库、标书查重、废标项检查，完全开源免费，欢迎使用

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Javis603/token-monitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Javis603/token-monitor
Language: javascript
Real-time token, cost, and AI limits widget with multi-device sync for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, OpenClaw, Cursor, Antigravity and more. | 为 AI Tools 打造的即时Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件，支持多设备同步

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NomaDamas/k-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NomaDamas/k-skill
Language: javascript
한국인을 위한 스킬 모음집 - SRT, KTX, 카카오톡, 한글과컴퓨터, 날씨, 미세먼지, 법령, 주식정보, 조선왕조실록, KBO, K-리그, LCK, 특허 검색, 토스 증권, 맞춤법 검사, 중고차 가격, 쿠팡, 네이버 블로그, 다이소, 올리브영, 택배 송장 조회 등등...

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenWhispr/openwhispr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenWhispr/openwhispr
Language: javascript
Voice-to-text dictation app with local (Nvidia Parakeet/Whisper) and cloud models (BYOK). Privacy-first and available cross-platform.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Official remote MCP server for Atlassian. Securely connect Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Bitbucket, and Compass to Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, VS Code, and other AI tools using OAuth 2.1 or API tokens.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ilysenko/codex-desktop-linux
Language: javascript
Unofficial ChatGPT desktop app for Linux (formerly the Codex app), built locally from OpenAI’s official macOS app. Includes Chat, Work, and Codex. Packages for Debian/Ubuntu (.deb), Fedora/openSUSE (.rpm), Arch (pacman), Nix/NixOS, and AppImage, with Wayland and X11 support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/power-platform-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/power-platform-skills
Language: javascript
A plugin marketplace for Claude Code/GitHub Copilot that provides Power Platform development plugins, including reusable skills, agents, and commands for building and deploying solutions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: poteto/hiring-without-whiteboards
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/poteto/hiring-without-whiteboards
Language: javascript
⭐️ Companies that don't have a broken hiring process

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: javascript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tt-a1i/archify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tt-a1i/archify
Language: javascript
Any agent Skill: generate beautiful architecture diagrams with dark/light theme toggle and PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG export

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ulsklyc/yuvomi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ulsklyc/yuvomi
Language: javascript
Self-hosted family planner - tasks, calendars, shopping, meals, budget. Your data, your server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wekan/wekan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wekan/wekan
Language: javascript
The Open Source kanban, built with Meteor. GitHub issues/PRs are only for FLOSS Developers, not for support, support is at https://wekan.fi/commercial-support/ . New English strings for new features at imports/i18n/data/en.i18n.json . Non-English translations at https://app.transifex.com/wekan/wekan only.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wwebjs/whatsapp-web.js
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wwebjs/whatsapp-web.js
Language: javascript
A WhatsApp client library for NodeJS that connects through the WhatsApp Web browser app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xifangczy/cat-catch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xifangczy/cat-catch
Language: javascript
猫抓 浏览器资源嗅探扩展 / cat-catch Browser Resource Sniffing Extension
